settings.heading: We are LogixX Fertility
settings.subtext: The leading advanced fertility diagnostic and treatment company — combining world-class science with compassionate, personalised care.
settings.vision_text: LogixX Fertility aims to be the best advanced (male-focused) fertility diagnostic and treatment company in the world.
settings.mission_text: LogixX Fertility in partnership with Testhim are the GO-TO companies for advanced fertility diagnostics & treatments. Through this partnership we provide extensive support to HCPs and patients through research, education, training and guidance — improving clinical outcomes and the patient experience.

settings.heading:
The science of fertility,
the heart of care
settings.subtext: Everything we do is guided by three core principles — rigorous science, compassionate support, and unwavering commitment to patient outcomes.

settings.title: Clinically Proven
settings.text: All our products and diagnostic tools are backed by peer-reviewed clinical research and recommended by leading fertility specialists worldwide.

settings.title: Expert-Led Care
settings.text: Our multidisciplinary team of reproductive endocrinologists, andrologists, and patient advocates ensures every person receives personalised, evidence-based guidance.

settings.title: Trusted for 15+ Years
settings.text: Since 2008, we have been at the forefront of fertility innovation — helping over 10,000 families and continuously advancing diagnostic and treatment standards.

settings.title: End-to-End Support
settings.text: From at-home testing to clinical-grade analysis and treatment plans, we provide a complete fertility pathway so you never have to navigate it alone.

settings.label: Clinical Evidence
settings.heading:
Proven results,
not just promises
settings.desc: Proxeed Plus has been validated in peer-reviewed clinical studies showing significant improvements across all key sperm parameters in just 90 days.

settings.heading: A decade of advancing fertility science
settings.subtext: From a single product to an end-to-end fertility platform — here is how LogixX grew.

settings.label: Founded
settings.title: LogixX Fertility established
settings.body: Founded with a singular goal: to make advanced fertility diagnostics and treatments accessible to everyone. Our founding team brought together clinicians, scientists, and patient advocates.

settings.label: Product Launch
settings.title: Proxeed range introduced
settings.body: After five years of clinical development, the Proxeed supplement range launched — backed by peer-reviewed studies demonstrating measurable improvements in sperm motility and morphology.

settings.label: Partnership
settings.title: Testhim partnership formed
settings.body: LogixX joined forces with Testhim to become the UK's leading advanced fertility diagnostic partnership, combining at-home testing with clinical-grade analysis and personalised treatment pathways.

settings.label: Innovation
settings.title: LensHooke X1 PRO launches
settings.body: We introduced the LensHooke X1 PRO — the world's first CASA-grade home sperm analysis device — putting clinical accuracy in the hands of patients for the first time.

settings.label: Milestone
settings.title: 10,000+ families supported
settings.body: A landmark moment: more than 10,000 families across the UK and beyond have now started or grown their families with the help of LogixX products, tests, and specialist guidance.

settings.heading: The experts behind every result
settings.subtext: Clinicians, scientists, and patient advocates united by one mission — helping families grow.

settings.name: Dr Sarah Mitchell
settings.bio: Reproductive endocrinologist with 20+ years experience. Leads our clinical research programme and protocol development.

settings.name: Prof. James Hartley
settings.bio: Published author of over 40 peer-reviewed papers on male fertility. Oversees our diagnostic innovation pipeline.

settings.name: Dr Aoife O'Brien
settings.bio: Expert in female hormone health and fertility preservation. Guides personalised patient care pathways.

settings.name: Tom Gallagher
settings.bio: Healthcare entrepreneur with a decade in medtech. Drives LogixX's commercial strategy and patient access mission.

settings.quote: My partner and I tried for over 2 years. After Proxeed Plus — we're now proud parents of baby Mia.
settings.name: Nick, 41

settings.quote: If you've been trying and can't conceive, get checked out and take action. We now have our perfect child.
settings.name: James

settings.quote: After taking Proxeed Women, six months later I was pregnant. Now I have a beautiful baby girl.
settings.name: Hannah, 35

settings.heading: Ready to take the next step?
settings.subtext: Speak with our team, explore our products, or get tested today. We're here every step of the way.
